copy.headline: Precision metal fabrication for demanding industries
copy.subhead: Family-run since 1987, serving aerospace and heavy equipment manufacturers across the Midwest.
copy.services_intro: Custom sheet metal, welding, and CNC machining built to your spec sheet.
copy.service_items: Laser cutting, press brake forming, MIG and TIG welding, powder coating.
copy.contact_blurb: Send us your drawings and we will return a quote within two business days.
